Shaping luxury retail, hospitality, and experiential environments across the GCC through architectural precision and emotional storytelling.

Luxury Retail, Hospitality, Immersive Experiences, Events & Activations, Private Residential, and Workplace Environments.

Explore Work → Connect
About

I design the emotional and sensory layer of physical space — the part people feel, not just see.

The atmosphere that shifts at the threshold. The sequence that shapes how people move, where they pause, and what they remember when they leave.

I work with luxury founders, hospitality developers, cultural institutions, private clients, and brands entering the GCC.

13+ Years
Industry experience
300+ Projects
Delivered across sectors
MBA
Luxury Management
